title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - July 2025
description:
01 Royksopp - Running To The Sea (True Electric) [Dog Triumph Profound Mysteries]

03 Richard Bass - Golden Mood [Elliptical Sun Melodies]

07 Will Clarke - Worship (Ashibah Remix) [Armada]

12 Oliver Smith & Amy J Pryce - Open Up  [Anjunabeats]
13 Sander van Doorn & BLR ft The Melody Men - Eyes Open Wide [Dreamstate Records]

15 Filterheadz - Yimanya  [ID&T] [CLASSIC OF THE MONTH]
16 BT - Godspeed (Grum Remix) [Black Hole Recordings]
17 Above & Beyond and Zoe Johnston - Carry Me Home [Anjunabeats]
18 John Monkman - Jungle [Anjunadeep]

20 Romain Garcia - Alone [Anjunadeep]
21 Em Kolé - Pleading [Soyka Records]
